title: The High Court Judges Salaries and Conditions of Service Act, 1954
full_text: The High Court Judges Salaries and Conditions of Service Act, 1954 उच्च् न्यायालय न्यायाधीश (वेतन और सेवा शर्त) अधिनियम, 1954 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 195428 Act Number: 28 Enactment Date: 1954-05-20 Act Year: 1954 Short Title: The High Court Judges Salaries and Conditions of Service Act, 1954 Hindi Title: उच्च् न्यायालय न्यायाधीश (वेतन और सेवा शर्त) अधिनियम, 1954 Long Title: An Act to regulate salaries and certain conditions of service of the Judges of High Courts. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Justice Enforcement Date: 20-05-1954 Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2. THE SECOND SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The High Court Judges Salaries and Conditions of Service Act, 1954 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPTER II LEAVE CHAPTER III SALARIES AND PENSIONS CHAPTER IV MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Kinds of leave admissible to a judge. Show Related Subordinates Section 4. Leave account showing the amount of leave due. Section 4A. Leave encashment. Section 5. Aggregate amount of leave which may be granted. Section 5A. Commutation of leave on half allowances into leave on full allowances. Section 6. Grant of leave not due. Section 7. Special disability leave. Section 8. Extraordinary leave. Section 9. Leave allowances. Section 10. [Omitted.]. Section 11. Combining leave with vacation. Section 12. Consequences of overstaying leave or vacation. Section 13. Authority competent to grant leave, etc. Section 13A. Salaries of the Judges. Section 14. Pension payable to Judges. Section 14A. Benefit of added years of service. Section 15. Special provision of pension in respect of Judges who are members of service. Section 16. Power of President to add to the service for pension. Section 17. Extraordinary pensions. Section 17A. Family pensions and gratuities. Section 17B. Additional quantum of pension or family pension. Section 18. [Omitted.]. Section 19. Commutation of Pensions. Section 20. Provident Fund. Section 20A. Deposit Linked Insurance Scheme. Section 21. Authority competent to grant pension. Section 22. Travelling allowances to a Judge. Section 22A. Facility of rent-free houses. Section 22B. Conveyance facilities. Section 22C. Sumptuary allowance. Section 22D. Exemption from liability to pay income-tax on certain perquisites received by a Judge. Section 23. Facilities for medical treatment and other conditions of service. Show Related Subordinates Section 23A. Vacation of High Courts. Section 23B. [Omitted.]. Section 23C. Special provisions in respect of Judges transferred from the High Court of Jammu and Kashmir. Section 23D. Medical facilities for retired Judges. Section 24. Power to make rules. Show Related Subordinates Section 25. [Omitted.]. Schedule 1. THE FIRST SCHEDULE. Order Appendix Forms Schedule 2.
